definitions.text: i boksing: ulovlig slag mot punkt under midjen
definitions.translation: in boxing: illegal blow below the waist

examples.no: utøveren ble diskvalifisert for slag under beltestedet
examples.en: the athlete was disqualified for a blow below the belt

examples.no: kommentaren var et slag under beltestedet
examples.en: the comment was a blow below the belt
